get.description: Returns service health status. Used for liveness/readiness probes.

get.summary: List API keys for the authenticated user. Key material is never returned.

post.summary: Create a new API key. Returns the raw key once - store it securely.

delete.summary: Revoke an API key. Only the owner can revoke.

post.summary: Rotate an API key: create a new key with same metadata and revoke the old one.

get.summary: Redirect to Google OAuth consent screen.
OAuth callback; exchange code for token.

post.summary:
Login with email and password. Rate limited.
Account lockout: after N failed attempts (default 5), account is locked for X minutes (default 15).
Logout (blacklist the current token). Requires Authorization: Bearer or session cookie.

get.summary: Get current user. Requires Authorization: Bearer <token>.

post.summary: Confirm password reset with token from email link.
Request a password reset email. Rate limited.

200.description: If email exists, reset link sent

post.summary:
Refresh the access token. Accepts Bearer or cookie; returns new token and sets cookie.
Old token is blacklisted (rotation). Tokens expired up to 5 minutes ago are accepted.
Register with email and password. Rate limited.
Send a 6-digit login code to the given email. Rate limited (5/min per IP).
Verify the 6-digit code and return an access token.
Upload file directly. Requires Authorization: Bearer token.

get.summary: Returns presigned PUT URL for uploading. Requires Authorization: Bearer token.
Returns presigned GET URL for the object. Requires Authorization: Bearer token.
List orgs the current user belongs to.
Get a single org by id.

post.summary: Create an invite for an org.
Create a workspace in an org.

get.summary: Returns presigned PUT URL for workspace-scoped upload.
Returns presigned GET URL for workspace-scoped object.

post.summary: Assign a role to a user. Requires `users:write`.

get.summary: List a user's roles. Requires `users:read` or viewing self.

delete.summary: Revoke a role from a user. Requires `users:write`.

post.summary:
Stripe webhook handler. Verifies signature and returns 200 quickly.
Process events async in production (spawn task or job queue).

ApiErrorResp.description: JSON body returned for API errors. Used in OpenAPI and error responses.
